message:
perf(mux): use encode-res downscale for fast debug-mode frames

- Revert BGRX surface to encode resolution (2.3M pixels) instead of
  source resolution (11.6M pixels) — 5x fewer pixels to process
- CPU does R↔B swap + nearest-neighbor downscale in one pass, VPP
  does BGRX→NV12 color conversion only (no scaling)
- Fix PPS pic_init_qp_minus26 to match encoder's QP=20, preventing
  decoder corruption at lower QP values
- Remove pipeline timing debug logs
